tool_args.label: Plasser cost avoidance achieved
tool_args.raw_text: cost avoidance of $179,125 was achieved

payload.description: Cost avoidance achieved through price negotiations on Plasser contract

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Option 1 negotiation savings
tool_args.raw_text: The net savings after negotiations, and after credits are applied and adjustments made from the original proposal totals $29,016,990

payload.description: Net savings from negotiations on Kawasaki Option 1 pricing

tool_args.label: Plasser sole source justification
tool_args.raw_text: It is requested that the Board declare competitive bidding impractical or inappropriate pursuant to Public Authorities Law Section 1209, Subsection 9(b) due to the existence of a single responsible source

payload.claim_text: Competitive bidding declared impractical or inappropriate due to existence of a single responsible source for Plasser equipment parts and repair services
payload.description: Sole-source justification for the Plasser American Corporation contract

tool_args.label: Plasser most favored customer pricing
tool_args.raw_text: Plasser has certified that the MTA agencies receive a greater discount on Plasser parts than any other transit agency in North America and that the MTA agencies are receiving its most favored customer pricing for both parts and service.

payload.claim_text: Plasser certified that MTA agencies receive greater discount on Plasser parts than any other transit agency in North America and are receiving most favored customer pricing
payload.description: Pricing certification for Plasser contract

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Option 1 cars to replace R46 fleet on A and C lines
tool_args.raw_text: The cars to be purchased under Option 1 will provide replacements for the R46 fleet that runs on the A and C lines.

payload.claim_text: The cars to be purchased under Option 1 will provide replacements for the R46 fleet that runs on the A and C lines
payload.description: Kawasaki Option 1 subway cars to replace R46 fleet on A and C lines

tool_args.label: Paratransit is a federally mandated service under ADA
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit transportation service is a federally mandated service in accordance with the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990.

payload.claim_text: Paratransit transportation service is a federally mandated service in accordance with the Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990
payload.description: Legal basis for paratransit service provision

tool_args.label: Paratransit fleet composition
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit's Paratransit fleet consists of 1,313 vehicles, made up of 859 Ford E-350 cutaway buses, 427 MV-1 vehicles, 17 Ford Transit vans, and 10 Ford Transit cutaway buses.

payload.claim_text: NYC Transit's Paratransit fleet consists of 1,313 vehicles: 859 Ford E-350 cutaway buses, 427 MV-1 vehicles, 17 Ford Transit vans, and 10 Ford Transit cutaway buses
payload.description: Current composition of NYC Transit's Paratransit fleet

tool_args.label: Paratransit planned procurement of 360 vehicles
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit recently secured funding to procure 288 Ford E-350 cutaway buses and 72 Ford Transit vans to replace vehicles which have been damaged or reached the end of their useful life.

payload.claim_text: Paratransit recently secured funding to procure 288 Ford E-350 cutaway buses and 72 Ford Transit vans
payload.description: Planned procurement of 360 paratransit vehicles to replace damaged or end-of-life vehicles

tool_args.label: C2K modification justified by attrition and project delays
tool_args.raw_text: DCE has recently lost a considerable number of personnel through attrition... as work under the R34211 Contract progressed, the car manufacturer experienced project delays

payload.claim_text: The need for additional engineering consultant support was driven by: (1) DCE lost considerable personnel through attrition, causing loss of institutional knowledge; (2) the car manufacturer experienced project delays on the R34211 Contract
payload.description: Justification for C2K Partners Modification 6 consulting support increase
